newFileDescription: Filename (relative to workspace root). The extension determines the language mode.
formatOnSaveSkippedDescription: No active language server for this file. Enable one in the statusbar, or pick Biome/Prettier in Settings.

saveConflict.title: File changed on disk
saveConflict.description: {{name}} was modified by another program while you had unsaved changes. Overwrite to keep your version.
